'''Alis Point''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="MTS" /> in the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="TEA-OC" /> and the site of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the base had to be [[Evacuation of Alis Point|evacuated]]. During the evacuation, [[Zev Senesca/Legends|Zev Senesca]] single-handedly held off three [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], while the base's unarmed [[Transport/Legends|transport]] fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Senesca's heroics earned him a spot in the newly founded [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].<ref name="MTS" />
